title: SafeNet Trusted Access - Terminate User SSO Sessions
content:
This playbook terminates user SSO sessions so that upon the next login attempt following the unlocking of the account, authentication is required.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Thales pack (SafeNet_Trusted_Access, partner-supported).

Inputs — UserName: Username of the user.; InstanceName: Name of the SafeNet Trusted Access integration instance..

Integrations/scripts used: IsIntegrationAvailable, PrintErrorEntry, Sleep, sta-delete-user-sessions, sta-get-user-info, sta-get-user-sessions, sta-validate-tenant.
raw_yaml:
description: This playbook terminates user SSO sessions so that upon the next login
  attempt following the unlocking of the account, authentication is required.
id: SafeNet Trusted Access - Terminate User SSO Sessions
inputs:
- description: Username of the user.
  key: UserName
  playbookInputQuery:
  required: true
  value:
    simple: ${incident.safenettrustedaccessusername}
- description: Name of the SafeNet Trusted Access integration instance.
  key: InstanceName
  playbookInputQuery:
  required: true
  value:
    simple: ${incident.safenettrustedaccessinstancename}
name: SafeNet Trusted Access - Terminate User SSO Sessions
outputs: []
